name: email-sentry
description: Watches your Gmail and buzzes your hotline channel only for mail that matters: a human asking you something, money moving, real deadlines, security events. One skill, /email-sentry:init, scaffolds the watcher engine, the LLM judge, and a managed hotline loop. Requires the gogcli (gog) CLI authenticated for your account(s) and a running hotline channel.
